hero.title: About AmplifiX
hero.description: We're a global press release and content syndication network, leveraging AI-powered intelligence to help companies communicate with precision, scale, and impact.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
paragraphs: AmplifiX is the intersection of artificial intelligence and strategic communications. We built a platform that transforms how companies—from emerging startups to established public enterprises—connect with investors, media, and stakeholders worldwide.

Our technology processes millions of data points to craft messaging that resonates, identifies opportunities others miss, and measures impact with precision. We don't just distribute content; we amplify stories that move markets.

features.title: Global Syndication
features.description: Distribute your message across 2,000+ publications in 35 languages, reaching the audiences that matter most to your business.

features.title: AI-Powered Intelligence
features.description: Our proprietary algorithms analyze market sentiment, optimize timing, and generate content that connects with your target audience.

features.title: Investor Relations
features.description: End-to-end IR solutions from earnings communications to shareholder engagement, built for compliance and impact.

features.title: Market Analytics
features.description: Real-time insights into competitor activity, sentiment shifts, and emerging trends that inform strategic decisions.

features.title: IPO & Fundraising
features.description: Strategic communications support for companies navigating capital raises, IPO preparation, and investor roadshows.

features.title: Compliance First
features.description: Every communication meets regulatory standards across jurisdictions, with built-in safeguards and audit trails.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: AI-enhanced methodology that optimizes your campaign
process.description: Transform your marketing, PR and communications using real-time intelligence. Our AI sifts through large data volumes, manages misinformation and high content demands—whether for crisis response or leveraging opportunities.

capabilities.title: Disinformation Detection
capabilities.description: Proactively identifies and neutralizes disinformation campaigns, safeguarding your organization's reputation.

capabilities.title: Anomaly Detection
capabilities.description: Strengthens enterprise security by pinpointing irregularities in media narratives for swift responses.

capabilities.title: Bot & Fake Account Detection
capabilities.description: Protects your digital presence by uncovering fake accounts and bot-driven activity.

capabilities.title: Real-Time Monitoring
capabilities.description: Provides continuous updates on critical issues, empowering strategic decision-making.

capabilities.title: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Delivers actionable insights into public and stakeholder sentiment to maintain trust.

capabilities.title: Executive Intelligence
capabilities.description: Real-time intelligence to defend against brand risks and impersonation threats.

steps.title: Content Distribution
steps.description: Leverage unique distribution channels globally in 20+ languages.

steps.title: Amplification
steps.description: Amplify your message between news releases for continuous engagement.

steps.title: Surveillance
steps.description: AI-powered detection of disinformation and manipulation for risk mitigation.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Data-driven assessment to dynamically react to live campaigns.

steps.title: Re-Target
steps.description: Re-target and reach your audience with precision.

items.title: Data-Driven Strategy
items.description: We combine AI-powered analytics with human expertise to deliver communications strategies grounded in real market intelligence.

items.title: Global Reach, Local Precision
items.description: Our network spans 35 languages and 2,000+ publications, with targeting capabilities that ensure your message reaches the right audiences.

items.title: Measurable Results
items.description: Every campaign comes with comprehensive analytics—track reach, engagement, sentiment, and ROI in real-time.

items.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
items.description: Your data and communications are protected by industry-leading security standards and compliance protocols.
